@sigil v0 hybrid
G: fix_skew
C: webhook_verify ∧ "300" ∧ "401" ∧ edge_reject
P: widen_window ∧ provider_skew_only ∧ min_fix ∧ reg_test
A: bump_tolerance ∧ add_reg_test

[AUDIT]
Goal: fix_skew.
Constraints: webhook_verify and "300" and "401" and edge_reject.
Plan: widen_window and provider_skew_only and min_fix and reg_test.
Answer target: bump_tolerance and add_reg_test.

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: stop_charge_loop
P: overdue⇒"402" ∧ grace<="24h" ∧ boundary_exclusive
V: no_loop ∧ regression_test ∧ min_fix

[AUDIT]
Goal: stop_charge_loop.
Plan: overdue implies "402" and grace<="24h" and boundary_exclusive.
Verify: no_loop and regression_test and min_fix.

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: deliver_arch
C: team_"9" ∧ ddl_"12 weeks" ∧ store_"PostgreSQL" ∧ ops_platform_sec ∧ steady_traffic ∧ compliance_ready
P: modular_monolith ∧ postgres_core ∧ async_workers ∧ iac_baseline
V: ddl_fit ∧ team_fit ∧ audit_ready
A: default_arch ∧ short_why

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: deliver_arch
C: team="6" ∧ ddl="9 weeks" ∧ store="PostgreSQL" ∧ pt_mlops ∧ async_enrichment
P: worker_sidecar ∧ postgres_queue ∧ reuse_stack
V: fits_ddl ∧ low_ops ∧ scales_async
A: default_arch ∧ short_why

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: path_traversal_risk
P: sanitize_filename ∧ resolve_and_validate_base ∧ reject_traversal
V: unit_tests ∧ fuzz_inputs ∧ path_boundary_check
A: patch_handler ∧ add_allowlist ∧ log_rejections

[AUDIT]
Goal: path_traversal_risk.
Plan: sanitize_filename and resolve_and_validate_base and reject_traversal.
Verify: unit_tests and fuzz_inputs and path_boundary_check.
Answer target: patch_handler and add_allowlist and log_rejections.

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: mitigate_risk
C: invoice_admin_api ∧ "SELECT" ∧ "sort" ∧ user_input_concat
P: sql_injection ∧ unvalidated_sort ∧ order_by_tainted
V: whitelist_sort ∧ parameterize ∧ reject_unknown
A: allowlist_columns ∧ parameterized_query ∧ input_validation ∧ security_tests

[AUDIT]
Goal: mitigate_risk.
Constraints: invoice_admin_api and "SELECT" and "sort" and user_input_concat.
Plan: sql_injection and unvalidated_sort and order_by_tainted.
Verify: whitelist_sort and parameterize and reject_unknown.
Answer target: allowlist_columns and parameterized_query and input_validation and security_tests.

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: refactor_reconcileBatch
C: has_anchors ∧ target_defined ∧ order_fixed
V: order_preserved ∧ anchors_present ∧ minimal_diff

[AUDIT]
Goal: refactor_reconcileBatch.
Constraints: has_anchors and target_defined and order_fixed.
Verify: order_preserved and anchors_present and minimal_diff.

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: refactor_loadGatewayUser
C: "async" ∧ "await" ∧ "next(err)" ∧ minimal_change
P: session_check ∧ db.findUser ∧ flags.load ∧ audit.log ∧ next
V: order_preserved ∧ db_err_forwards_"next(err)" ∧ async_await_used
A: apply_async_await ∧ await_each_step ∧ try_catch_db→"next(err)" ∧ call_next_last
